CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Products (ProductID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ProductName VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Products (ProductID, ProductName) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT length(ProductName) FROM Demo.demo.Products WHERE ProductID = 1;
SELECT length(ProductName) FROM Demo.demo.Products WHERE ProductID = 2;
SELECT length(ProductName) FROM Demo.demo.Products WHERE ProductID = 3;
SELECT ProductID, length(ProductName) AS NameLength FROM Demo.demo.Products;
SELECT COUNT(*), MAX(length(ProductName)), MIN(length(ProductName)) FROM Demo.demo.Products;
SELECT ProductID, length(ProductName) AS NameLength FROM Demo.demo.Products WHERE length(ProductName) > 0;
SELECT length(CONCAT(ProductName, ' test')) FROM Demo.demo.Products WHERE ProductID = 1;
SELECT length(ProductName || ' example') FROM Demo.demo.Products WHERE ProductID = 1;
